title: Swatowot® 10 Pack 15 cm Large Heavy Duty S Hooks Non Slip Vinyl Coated S Hook for Hanging, Steel Metal Black Rubber Coated Closet S Hooks for Hanging Plants Jeans Pot Pan Cups Towels Hats Jewelry
features: Durable and Anti-rust: Our heavy duty s hook made of premium metal steel with vinyl coated surface, strong and safe enough. , Anti-rust and smooth surface, no need worrying scratch your scarf or clothes when using it.

Falling Resistance Design: Our Large Vinyl Coated S Hooks are different from orther common s hook, our closet hooks are coated vinyl rubber on the surface, which can resist falling and slipping.These hooks would not come off when you remove the item.
Size: length approx. 15 cm / 6 inch ; The large opening end: 6.4 cm / 2.5 inch ,the small opening end: 3 cm / 1.2 inch. These S hooks with large and small ends can meet different widths of rods.

Easy to Use: Premium S-Hooks Garden Hanging Hooks are easy to hang on existing objects,not need tools,nails, screws, or adhesives.Heay duty s hook are strong enough to hang heavier items ,and the large size s hooks could hang many item to save space in your home.

Widely Use: Heavy duty multi-use utility hooks can use in the closet, garage, laundry room and kitchen, pantry, mud room, office, even outdoors.Compatible with most metal, wire, baskets, bins, wood and plastic shelves and crates to hang your items to save space.
Package includes 10 pieces hooks; Size: 15 cm ; Black color Large S hooks
description: Swatowot 10 Pack 15 cm Large Heavy Duty S Hooks Non Slip Vinyl Coated S Hook for Hanging, Steel Metal Black Rubber Coated Closet S Hooks for Hanging Plants Jeans Pot Pan Cups Towels Hats Jewelry Specifications: - Length: 15 cm - Maximum bearing weight: 10 kg - Thickness: 7 mm - Diameter of openings: 6.4 cm and 3 cm - Color: Black - Quantity: 10 pack Features: - Our Heavy Duty S hooks are a simple and brilliant storage solution for hanging anything in your kitchen, closet, workshop or garage where space is limited. Just simply hang them on pot rack, wall rails or shelves. - S shaped hooks are widely applied in office, bedrooms, bathrooms, etc.; There is no need to stick or use screws. - Made of heavy duty metal; Maximum bearing weight: 10 kg - The S-hook is 15 cm in length and 7 mm in thickness; The diameter of openings are 6.4 cm and 3 cm These S hooks with large and small ends can meet different widths of rods.
